title: The Shop
description: A simple mods that adds a mini shop
body:
# Do you need some wood for that new house you are building but you don't want to go get some? Well now you can just buy some from this simple shop!

Just press Z and the shop will pop up. You will have the option to buy some wood, steak if you get hungry, or an iron sword to fight of those zombies. There are also many other Items you can buy including: Golden apples, Cobblestone, and Arrows.

## INSTRUCTIONS 

1. Select what you would like to buy.
2. Put the required matirials in the bottom left two slots.
3. Take from the bottom right slot.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HvQ8TiQVJwI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
